final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            data_out <= data_in; // Write data to the cell
        end
        // If we is low, retain the current value
    end
endmodule
